mapper.sql: rw.re_id as rr_id, rw.company, rw.post, rw.start_time, rw.end_time, rw.salary_old, rw.reasons_leaving, rw.witness, rw.tele, rw.remarks, rw.attribute1, rw.attribute2, rw.attribute3, rw.enabled_flag, rw.id, rw.create_by, rw.update_time, rw.create_time, rw.update_by, rw.work_time_new

${tAlias}.re_id as ${tAlias}_rr_id, ${tAlias}.company as ${tAlias}_company, ${tAlias}.post as ${tAlias}_post, ${tAlias}.start_time as ${tAlias}_start_time, ${tAlias}.end_time as ${tAlias}_end_time, ${tAlias}.salary_old as ${tAlias}_salary_old, ${tAlias}.reasons_leaving as ${tAlias}_reasons_leaving, ${tAlias}.witness as ${tAlias}_witness, ${tAlias}.tele as ${tAlias}_tele, ${tAlias}.remarks as ${tAlias}_remarks, ${tAlias}.attribute1 as ${tAlias}_attribute1, ${tAlias}.attribute2 as ${tAlias}_attribute2, ${tAlias}.attribute3 as ${tAlias}_attribute3, ${tAlias}.enabled_flag as ${tAlias}_enabled_flag, ${tAlias}.id as ${tAlias}_id, ${tAlias}.create_by as ${tAlias}_create_by, ${tAlias}.update_time as ${tAlias}_update_time, ${tAlias}.create_time as ${tAlias}_create_time, ${tAlias}.update_by as ${tAlias}_update_by,${tAlias}.work_time_new as ${tAlias}_work_time_new
mapper.insert: insert into re_workhistory (re_id, company, post, start_time, end_time, salary_old, reasons_leaving, witness, tele, remarks, attribute1, attribute2, attribute3, enabled_flag, create_by, update_time, create_time, update_by,work_time_new) values (#{recruitment.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{company,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{post,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{startTime,jdbcType=DATE}, #{endTime,jdbcType=DATE}, #{salaryOld,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{reasonsLeaving,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{witness,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{tele,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{remarks,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute3,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{enabledFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{createBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT},#{workTimeNew,jdbcType=VARCHAR})
mapper.update: update re_workhistory set re_id = #{recruitment.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, company = #{company,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, post = #{post,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, start_time = #{startTime,jdbcType=DATE}, end_time = #{endTime,jdbcType=DATE}, salary_old = #{salaryOld,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, reasons_leaving = #{reasonsLeaving,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, witness = #{witness,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, tele = #{tele,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, remarks = #{remarks,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute1 = #{attribute1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute2 = #{attribute2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute3 = #{attribute3,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, enabled_flag = #{enabledFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
